title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: Vibe coding as a team sport, teaching interviewers to surface real signal, what's missing from leadership offsites, and more
description: This community-curated roundup tackles practical challenges in product and design leadership, from team dynamics to interview processes and offsite effectiveness. It offers diverse perspectives on what's actually missing from how teams operate and improve.

title: 10 Claude Code Tips & Tricks from Boris Cherny for Product Teams
description: Learning directly from a tool creator provides insider knowledge that can significantly boost team productivity and skill development in AI-assisted design workflows.
